message:
feat(bus): pass rootDir through spawner to agent subprocesses

Spawner passes SPROUT_ROOT_DIR env var to child processes.
agent-process.ts reads it and creates Genome with rootDir,
calling loadRoot() for overlay resolution. Agent passes rootDir
to spawner when delegating.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
